## What Would You Like To Improve?

Describe the workflow, format, editing guidance, or safety behavior you want improved.

## Why It Matters

Explain the user scenario.

## Suggested Direction

Optional: describe a possible implementation or wording change.

## Safety Check

- [ ] This request keeps original photos protected.
- [ ] This request does not require uploading private photos by default.
